name: Rosalynn's Hushpuppies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all dry ingredients together.
2. Add egg, onion, and buttermilk to the mixture.
3. Drop batter by small spoonfuls into deep fat.
4. The hushpuppies will sink toward the bottom of the pot, then pop back up when they reach the surface.
5. Turn off the heat if the hushpuppies don't start popping over when they turn brown on one side.
6. Drain the cooked hushpuppies on paper towels and serve warm.
